title: Mirror items between boards on a 1 - many basis
excerpt: I have two boards. One with items (events), and another with vendors (vendor names). I’d like to add vendors to the board with items as a column, and have that reflect in the vendors, in a column. It would be a 1 - many …

posts.author: cwaj400 (Will Angell-James)
posts.cookedHtml: I have two boards. One with items (events), and another with vendors (vendor names). I’d like to add vendors to the board with items as a column, and have that reflect in the vendors, in a column. It would be a 1 - many relationship, with one vendor to many events.
